metadata.description: Akar Örme — Premium tricot production for global fashion brands. Precision knitwear manufacturing with decades of textile expertise.

hero.label: Premium Knitwear Manufacturing
hero.description: Decades of textile expertise woven into every metre. From premium yarn to finished fabric — engineered for the world's leading fashion houses.

brandStory.label: Since 2000
brandStory.heading: Crafting Excellence,
brandStory.paragraph1: For over two decades, Akar Örme has been the trusted production partner behind some of the world's finest knitwear labels. Our 15,000 m² facility in İstanbul houses 120+ state-of-the-art knitting machines, a dedicated dyeing department, and a quality laboratory — all operating under ISO 9001 and OEKO-TEX® standards.
brandStory.paragraph2: We don't just manufacture fabric — we engineer textile solutions tailored to each brand's vision, from yarn selection to final inspection.

fabricCards.label: Our Fabrics
fabricCards.heading: Engineered
fabricCards.description: Six core fabric families produced on state-of-the-art circular and flatbed knitting machines — each tuned for specific end-use requirements.

modelGrid.label: Featured Models
modelGrid.heading: Our
modelGrid.description: From classic polos to contemporary knitwear — every piece is precision-engineered for global fashion brands.

cta.label: Start Your Project
cta.heading: Ready to Bring Your
cta.description: Whether you need 500 metres or 50,000 — our team is ready to engineer the perfect knitwear solution for your brand.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Akar Örme's 25+ year history in premium knitwear manufacturing. Our factory philosophy, mission, and vision.
about.heroSubtitle: 25+ years of precision knitwear manufacturing — from a 12-machine workshop to a world-class production facility.

values.title: Precision
values.description: Every stitch is calibrated, every tension measured. We treat knitwear manufacturing as an exact science.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuous investment in R&D and next-gen knitting technology keeps us at the leading edge of textile production.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: From waterless dyeing pilots to solar-powered operations — responsible production is woven into our DNA.

about.missionText: To deliver premium knitwear fabrics and finished garments that exceed our partners' expectations — through cutting-edge technology, rigorous quality control, and a deeply collaborative approach to manufacturing.
about.visionText: To lead the future of sustainable knitwear manufacturing through cutting-edge technology, responsible practices, and unwavering commitment to craftsmanship. By 2030, we aim to achieve fully carbon-neutral production.
about.factoryDesc: A glimpse into our 15,000 m² production facility in İstanbul.

collections.metaDescription: Explore the full AKAR ÖRME knitwear collection — filterable by category, season, and gauge.
collections.heroSubtitle: Browse our full catalogue of knitwear models — each precision-engineered for the world's leading fashion brands.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Akar Örme. Contact our team for knitwear manufacturing inquiries, factory visits, and partnership opportunities.
contact.heroSubtitle: Ready to start your next knitwear project? Reach out to our team — we'd love to hear from you.

references.metaDescription: Akar Örme's trusted partnerships with global fashion brands across 30+ countries.
references.heroSubtitle: Trusted by 500+ brands across 30+ countries — building long-term partnerships through quality and reliability.

modelDetail.overviewExtra: Each piece undergoes rigorous quality inspection before shipping — from yarn tension testing to colorfastness analysis — ensuring every batch meets the exacting standards of global fashion brands.

referenceLogos.heading: Trusted
referenceLogos.description: We proudly serve leading fashion houses, retailers, and private-label brands worldwide.

technology.metaDescription: Explore Akar Örme's interactive technology modules — 3D knitwear viewer, knit pattern explorer, and factory capability dashboard.
technology.heroSubtitle: Interactive modules showcasing our textile expertise, production capability, and innovative approach to knitwear manufacturing.
technology.sectionDesc: We believe in transparency. These interactive tools let you experience our production quality, textile knowledge, and manufacturing scale before stepping into our factory.

modules.title: 3D Knitwear Viewer
modules.description: Rotate, zoom, and explore garments in an immersive WebGL 3D viewer with realistic knit textures and lighting.

modules.title: Knit Pattern Explorer
modules.description: Select yarn, technique, and gauge in an interactive step-by-step module — see the resulting fabric and performance metrics.

modules.title: Factory Dashboard
modules.description: Animated production statistics, machine fleet breakdown, gauge distribution, and interactive export world map.

viewer.metaDescription: Explore Akar Örme knitwear models in an interactive 3D viewer. Rotate, zoom, and examine yarn textures in detail.
viewer.heroSubtitle: Rotate, zoom, and explore our precision-knit garments in an immersive 3D experience.
viewer.infoDesc: Our 3D viewer uses procedural knit textures and physically-based rendering to simulate realistic yarn behaviour. Every stitch loop, light reflection, and fabric drape is computed in real time.

features.title: 360° Rotation
features.desc: Drag to rotate the garment freely.

features.title: Scroll Zoom
features.desc: Zoom into the knit texture detail.

viewer.productionDesc: Each model shown represents actual production capability. Request a sample to feel the real texture and quality.

patterns.metaDescription: Discover how yarn type, knitting technique, and gauge combine to create unique fabrics. An interactive textile learning module by Akar Örme.
patterns.heroSubtitle: Select yarn, technique and gauge — see the resulting fabric in real time.

dashboard.metaDescription: Explore Akar Örme's production capability — 128+ knitting machines, 25,000m daily capacity, and exports to 32+ countries.
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Real-time production metrics, machine fleet data, and our global export network — all in one view.

knitwearViewer.hint: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom
knitwearViewer.infoDesc: Procedural knit normal map simulates real yarn loops. The lighting reveals texture depth and stitch detail as you rotate the model.

yarn.title: Select Yarn Type
yarn.desc: Choose the fibre that defines the fabric's core character.

technique.title: Select Knitting Technique
technique.desc: The structure determines stretch, texture, and drape.

gauge.title: Select Gauge
gauge.desc: Gauge controls fabric density, weight, and feel.

patternExplorer.resultDesc: Here's the fabric your selections produce.

factoryDashboard.exportSubtitle: Interactive map — hover to explore destinations

machines.label: Knitting Machines
machines.description: State-of-the-art circular and flat knitting machines

capacity.label: Daily Capacity
capacity.description: Metres of premium fabric produced daily

yarns.label: Yarn Varieties
yarns.description: Natural, synthetic, and blended yarn options

employees.label: Expert Staff
employees.description: Skilled technicians, designers, and quality teams

fabrics.name: Single Jersey
fabrics.description: The classic foundation of premium knitwear — smooth face, subtle back loops. Our Supima cotton single jersey offers exceptional softness with perfect drape for T-shirts, underwear, and luxe basics.

fabrics.name: Interlock
fabrics.description: Double-faced stability without compromise. Interlock's identical look on both sides makes it ideal for polo shirts, structured layers, and garments that need body without weight.

fabrics.name: Piqué Knit
fabrics.description: The distinctive waffle-like texture that defines the modern polo. Our long-staple cotton piqué is breathable, dimensionally stable, and built for repeated wash cycles.

fabrics.name: French Terry
fabrics.description: Soft loops on the inside, smooth on the outside — the fabric behind every premium sweatshirt. Our cotton-poly blend balances comfort, structure, and easy-care performance.

fabrics.name: Milano Rib
fabrics.description: Dense, firm, and luxuriously structured — Milano rib is perfect for tailored knitwear, blazers, and architectural silhouettes that hold their shape impeccably.

fabrics.name: Cable & Jacquard
fabrics.description: Complex stitch patterns that tell a story. Our heavy-gauge jacquard and cable fabrics bring artisan-level texture to cold-weather collections and heritage-inspired fashion.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.description: Akar Örme was founded in İstanbul with 12 circular knitting machines and a vision to deliver world-class knitwear.

timeline.title: First Export
timeline.description: Secured first international contract with a Scandinavian fashion house, marking the start of our global journey.

timeline.title: ISO 9001 Certification
timeline.description: Achieved ISO 9001 quality management certification, establishing rigorous production standards across all departments.

timeline.title: Factory Expansion
timeline.description: Expanded to a 15,000 m² integrated facility with in-house dyeing, finishing, and quality laboratory.

timeline.title: OEKO-TEX® Standard
timeline.description: Earned OEKO-TEX® Standard 100 certification, ensuring every fabric meets the highest safety and sustainability benchmarks.

timeline.title: 120+ Machines
timeline.description: Fleet surpassed 120 circular knitting machines, covering gauges from 3 GG to 28 GG for any production requirement.

timeline.title: Sustainable Manufacturing
timeline.description: Adopted waterless dyeing pilots and solar-powered operations as part of our 2030 carbon-neutral commitment.

timeline.title: Today & Beyond
timeline.description: Serving 500+ global brands across 32 countries — and still investing in the future of knitwear.
